Battlefield Guide:
I'll explain about the basic rules of the Treasure Chest of the Cursed Sword and the Priest of Purification.
Treasure Chest Basic Rules 1. If the Treasure Chest gets destroyed, the Cursed Sword will disappear and it will be dropped in the world again. - Applies to both when it is dropped on the ground without an owner and when there's an owner as well. 2. The Treasure Chest receives damage from the owner of the Cursed Sword / Priest of Purification / PC.

Priest of Purification Basic Rules 1. The Priest of Purification only receives damage from the owner of the Cursed Sword. 2. The Priest of Purification has a mission to destroy the Treasure Chest of the Cursed Sword.

Conditions to Cancel Petrification of Treasure Chest and Priest of Purification 1. When the owner of the Cursed Sword remains in a peace zone for more than 10 minutes. 2. When 30 minutes have passed since the owner of the Cursed Sword has logged out. 3. Monday thru Thursday 23:30~23:59
